product_updates.title: Cyera eyes $12B valuation at 80x ARR multiple despite operating losses
product_updates.content: The cybersecurity company is nearing a $300 million round led by Evolution Equity Partners.

product_updates.title: Uber caps employee AI spending after blowing through budget in 4 months
product_updates.content: Uber's cutback has occurred after the company had reportedly encouraged staff to use AI as much as possible.

product_updates.title: New Microsoft tool lets devs spin up AI behavior tests using text descriptions
product_updates.content: Microsoft on Tuesday took the wraps off Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing, an open source framework for spinning up AI evaluations.

product_updates.title: Martin Scorsese becomes the latest — and most unlikely — Hollywood voice for AI
product_updates.content: The caveat is that one of the world's most famous living directors is using the tech solely for storyboarding.

product_updates.title: Microsoft launches Scout, an OpenClaw-inspired personal assistant
product_updates.content: Launched at Build, Microsoft Scout is a new AI assistant meant to bring the power and flexibility of OpenClaw into the Microsoft 365 system.

product_updates.title: Google rolls out fake call detection to protect against AI deepfake impersonation scams
product_updates.content: As people increasingly refuse to answer calls from unknown numbers, scammers are shifting their tactics by spoofing trusted phone numbers and using AI deepfake technology to sound like authority figures, family members, or employers.

product_updates.title: Microsoft offers devs a better way to control AI agent behavior
product_updates.content: The specification lets developer, compliance, and security teams define their own policies for agents to follow in portable policy files.

product_updates.title: Amazon faces class action lawsuit over Ring facial-recognition feature
product_updates.content: The class action lawsuit, filed in Seattle by Virginia resident Charles Sigwalt, claims that Ring's Familiar Faces feature stores images of passersby without consent.

product_updates.title: Trump signs narrower executive order on AI oversight after industry objections
product_updates.content: After industry objections, President Trump signed a revised AI executive order requiring only voluntary prerelease government reviews of advanced models.

product_updates.title: OpenAI launches new Codex tools for white-collar work
product_updates.content: OpenAI released a set of six plug-ins aimed at specific jobs: data analytics, creative production, sales, product design, equity investing, and investment banking. Available from within the Codex app, each of the new tools bundles integrations, instructions, and context to allow Codex to approxim…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Rehumanizing global health care with agentic AI
technical_breakthroughs.content: The global health care sector is under increasing strain. Decades of chronic underinvestment and constraints in recruitment have coincided with a surge in demand for services for aging populations. Gaps in provision are already taking a toll, with fragmented access to care and high rates of stres…
